note: Verified over repeated runs: legacy itself splits ~1/3 vs 2/3 on whether to call draft_response for a casual message with no matching 'batch into digest' tool in TOOL_REGISTRY -- genuine LLM sampling variance on an ambiguous persona instruction, not a migration-introduced regression. Comparison reports but doesn't hard-fail on split decisions here.

payload.message: Hey! Any interest in grabbing dinner sometime next week? No rush, whenever works.
